---
title: "SOLARIS OPPIDUM · CL-Link"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  @font-face{font-family:'Pretendard';src:url('assets/fonts/PretendardVariable.woff2') format('woff2-variations');font-weight:100 900;font-style:normal;font-display:swap;}
  body{font-family:'Pretendard','Apple SD Gothic Neo','Noto Sans KR',system-ui,sans-serif;}
  .deck-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:24px;max-width:980px;margin:40px auto;}
  .deck-card{display:block;text-decoration:none;background:#fff;border:1px solid #D8E0F0;padding:36px 32px;transition:.15s;}
  .deck-card:hover{border-color:#2A5ADA;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(26,42,102,.10);}
  .deck-eyebrow{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#5B6B8C;text-transform:uppercase;}
  .deck-title{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;color:#1A2A66;margin:8px 0 10px;}
  .deck-desc{font-size:14px;color:#16223D;line-height:1.6;}
  .deck-go{margin-top:18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#2A5ADA;}
</style>

<div class="deck-grid">
  <a class="deck-card" href="im/index.html">
    <div class="deck-eyebrow">Part I–II</div>
    <div class="deck-title">INVESTMENT MEMORANDUM</div>
    <div class="deck-desc">CL-Link 플랫폼 투자 설명자료. 시장분석부터 핵심 솔루션(CB-RMS·Octopus), 비즈니스 모델, 회사소개까지 15개 슬라이드.</div>
    <div class="deck-go">발표 시작 →</div>
  </a>
  <a class="deck-card" href="dcm/index.html">
    <div class="deck-eyebrow">Part III · 시스템 시연</div>
    <div class="deck-title">Dynamic Collateral Management</div>
    <div class="deck-desc">동적 담보관리 로직 상세. 7팩터 종목등급, 계좌등급 산정, 동적 LTV, 위기 시 자동 통제 메커니즘.</div>
    <div class="deck-go">발표 시작 →</div>
  </a>
</div>
```
